top_signals.title: New Estimates Challenge Assumptions About Lost Gulf Oil Supply
top_signals.summary: In the immediate aftermath of the U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran that prompted the latter to shut down the Strait of Hormuz, most reports dealt with numbers—numbers showing the amount of oil supply lost due to the closure. Those numbers varied by source, but were all above 10 million barrels daily. Now, traders are saying the loss in supply may be much smaller. “After an initial disruption at the onset of the conflict, flows strengthened as alternative logistics scaled up,” analytics provider Kpler explained, as quoted by Reuters,…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AviadoBio Expands vMiX™ Precision Gene Silencing Platform Exclusive License Agreement with King’s College London Beyond Neurological Diseases to All Human Therapeutic Areas
top_signals.summary: vMiX™ is a vectorized RNA interference (RNAi) platform combining knockdown, cell-specific expression with the flexibility to target multiple genes Update follows recent positive AVB-406 preclinical data presented at ASGCT, supporting the broad therapeutic potential of the vMiX platform including initiation of clinical trials in 2026
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Children as young as 14 are being targeted by unregulated gambling firms on social
top_signals.summary: Children as young as 14 are being targeted by unregulated gambling firms, with AI-generated tipsters, influencers and the manosphere blamed for exploiting teenagers on social media. Over 30 unregulated gambling sites – such as Stake and Rainbet – are accused of targeting UK users primarily aged 14-25, according to new data collected last month by [...]

top_signals.title: Qualco Supports London’s Air Ambulance Charity as £1.5m Raised at Black & White Gala
top_signals.summary: Qualco Group and the Qualco Foundation have announced their support for London’s Air Ambulance Charity, helping raise £1.5 million at the Black & White Gala, one of the capital’s most prominent fundraising events. The event, which is hosted every two years by the charity’s Philanthropy Board, took place this year on June 4, bringing together [...]

top_signals.title: DOJ seizes CFAKE, SOCFAKE deepfake nude sites under TAKE IT DOWN Act
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Department of Justice announced Friday that it has seized the CFAKE.com and SOCFAKE.com websites, which allegedly hosted nonconsensual AI-generated nude images and videos of women, in what appears to be the first publicly announced domain seizure under the TAKE IT DOWN Act. [...]
